Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
353 
REV_CNTR_NDC_QTY_QLFR_CD 
LABEL: 
Revenue Center NDC Quantity Qualifier Code 
DESCRIPTION: Effective with version “J,” the code used to indicate the unit of measurement for the drug that was 
administered. 
SHORT NAME: REV_CNTR_NDC_QTY_QLFR_CD 
LONG NAME: REV_CNTR_NDC_QTY_QLFR_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
F2 = International Unit 
GR = Gram 
ML =
